data.Name: Drogon DG2 - HSE and environmental impact
data.Summary: Marine discharge and accidental spill risk during subsea installation and production operations in the Drogon area.
data.Description: Environmental impact assessment (EIA) identifies cold-water coral habitats within 2 km of the planned template locations. Produced water discharge exceeding 30 mg/L oil-in-water requires additional treatment capacity on the FPSO. Accidental spill scenarios (blowout, pipeline rupture) modelled with OSCAR show shoreline impact probability <2% under prevailing current conditions. Mitigation: coral avoidance routing for flowlines, enhanced produced-water treatment module, and subsea isolation valves at each template.
